title: container cannot be started because of a permission denied error.
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

/kind feature

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1.
on rhel 8.1, the system is configured using cgroup v1.

2.
podman started by a python script and the python script is put in to a cgroup.
podman cli:

/usr/bin/docker --log-level debug run --cidfile /tmp/lsf.lsf1010.job.5095.1592973527.task.1.1592973531318033 -v /scratch/lsf_addon/lcui/lsf1010:/scratch/lsf_addon/lcui/lsf1010 -v /home/xianwu:/home/xianwu -w /home/xianwu/ -it -v /home/xianwu/.lsbatch:/home/xianwu/.lsbatch -v /tmp:/tmp --env-file=/tmp/.sbd.env.lsf1010.5095.task.1.1592973531318033 --rm --sig-proxy=false --net=host --ipc=host -v /scratch/lsf_addon/lcui/passwd.podman:/etc/passwd -v /scratch/lsf_addon/lcui/group:/etc/group --userns=keep-id   --name lsf1010.job.5095.task.1 localhost/centos:lc /bin/sh -c sleep 100000




**Describe the results you received:**
the container cannot be started successfully.

**Describe the results you expected:**
the container can be started successfully.


**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**
[root@lsf1x125 ~]# rpm -qa |grep podman
podman-1.6.4-11.module+el8.2.0+6368+cf16aa14.x86_64
cockpit-podman-12-1.module+el8.2.0+6368+cf16aa14.noarch
python-podman-api-1.2.0-0.2.gitd0a45fe.module+el8.2.0+6368+cf16aa14.noarch
podman-docker-1.6.4-11.module+el8.2.0+6368+cf16aa14.noarch
```
[root@lsf1x125 ~]# podman version
Version:            1.6.4
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.13.4
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64```

```

podman --log-level debug run

time="2020-06-23T23:08:53-04:00" level=debug msg="Received: -1"
time="2020-06-23T23:08:53-04:00" level=debug msg="Cleaning up container f16ac56c08ec0f9db83afd6760b28e6ed80be0e46daa26033c5d66965ac95b09"

time="2020-06-23T23:08:53-04:00" level=debug msg="ExitCode msg: \"time=\\\"2020-06-23t23:08:53-04:00\\\" level=error msg=\\\"container_linux.go:349: starting container process caused \\\\\\\"process_linux.go:333: applying cgroup configuration for process caused \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"failed to write 3135182 to cgroup.procs: write /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/lsf/lsf1010/job.5093.3134788.1592968124/tsk.5093.3134998/child.3134999/f16ac56c08ec0f9db83afd6760b28e6ed80be0e46daa26033c5d66965ac95b09/cgroup.procs: permission denied\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\"\\ncontainer_linux.go:349: starting container process caused \\\"process_linux.go:333: applying cgroup configuration for process caused \\\\\\\"failed to write 3135182 to cgroup.procs: write /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/lsf/lsf1010/job.5093.3134788.1592968124/tsk.5093.3134998/child.3134999/f16ac56c08ec0f9db83afd6760b28e6ed80be0e46daa26033c5d66965ac95b09/cgroup.procs: permission denied\\\\\\\"\\\": oci runtime permission denied error\""
time="2020-06-23T23:08:53-04:00" level=error msg="time=\"2020-06-23T23:08:53-04:00\" level=error msg=\"container_linux.go:349: starting container process caused \\\"process_linux.go:333: applying cgroup configuration for process caused \\\\\\\"failed to write 3135182 to cgroup.procs: write /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/lsf/lsf1010/job.5093.3134788.1592968124/tsk.5093.3134998/child.3134999/f16ac56c08ec0f9db83afd6760b28e6ed80be0e46daa26033c5d66965ac95b09/cgroup.procs: permission denied\\\\\\\"\\\"\"\ncontainer_linux.go:349: starting container process caused \"process_linux.go:333: applying cgroup configuration for process caused \\\"failed to write 3135182 to cgroup.procs: write /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/lsf/lsf1010/job.5093.3134788.1592968124/tsk.5093.3134998/child.3134999/f16ac56c08ec0f9db83afd6760b28e6ed80be0e46daa26033c5d66965ac95b09/cgroup.procs: permission denied\\\"\": OCI runtime permission denied error"

comments.body: should this be filed as a rh bugzilla?

This does not appear to be a Podman bug; I strongly suspect that whatever if configuring the cgroup you place Podman in, is doing so incorrectly, such that the OCI runtime does not have permission to create and modify a child cgroup for the container.

@rhatdan @mheon @baude 

Something weird is that when I removed the "--userns=keep-id" the container can be started successfully.

Any input?

I can see logs from  journalctl when container running with "--userns=keep-id"
Jun 28 04:30:32 lsf1x125 conmon[3718653]: conmon b1d5f27576b39b2b2728 <ninfo>: addr{sun_family=AF_UNIX, sun_path=/tmp/run-33857/libpod/tmp/socket/b1d5f27576b39b2b2728f059ff688fdf8c30ea87a5d2634a938aa5678e3a8f8f/attach}
Jun 28 04:30:32 lsf1x125 conmon[3718653]: conmon b1d5f27576b39b2b2728 <ninfo>: terminal_ctrl_fd: 13
Jun 28 04:30:32 lsf1x125 conmon[3718653]: conmon b1d5f27576b39b2b2728 <ninfo>: winsz read side: 15, winsz write side: 15
Jun 28 04:30:32 lsf1x125 conmon[3718653]: conmon b1d5f27576b39b2b2728 <ninfo>: about to accept from console_socket_fd: 4
Jun 28 04:30:32 lsf1x125 conmon[3718653]: conmon b1d5f27576b39b2b2728 <ninfo>: about to recvfd from connfd: 11
Jun 28 04:30:32 lsf1x125 conmon[3718653]: conmon b1d5f27576b39b2b2728 <ninfo>: console = {.name = '(null)'; .fd = 0}
Jun 28 04:30:32 lsf1x125 conmon[3718653]: conmon b1d5f27576b39b2b2728 <nwarn>: Failed to get console terminal settings
Jun 28 04:30:32 lsf1x125 conmon[3718653]: conmon b1d5f27576b39b2b2728 <ndebug>: couldn't find cb for pid 3718664
Jun 28 04:30:32 lsf1x125 conmon[3718653]: conmon b1d5f27576b39b2b2728 <error>: Failed to create container: exit status 1


and the console output shows that permission denied when creating container:

time="2020-06-28T04:30:32-04:00" level=debug msg="ExitCode msg: \"time=\\\"2020-06-28t04:30:32-04:00\\\" level=error msg=\\\"container_linux.go:349: starting container process caused \\\\\\\"process_linux.go:333: applying cgroup configuration for process caused \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"failed to write 3718664 to cgroup.procs: write /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/lsf/lsf1010/job.5741.3718294.1593333023/tsk.5741.3718493/child.3718494/b1d5f27576b39b2b2728f059ff688fdf8c30ea87a5d2634a938aa5678e3a8f8f/cgroup.procs: permission denied\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\"\\ncontainer_linux.go:349: starting container process caused \\\"process_linux.go:333: applying cgroup configuration for process caused \\\\\\\"failed to write 3718664 to cgroup.procs: write /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/lsf/lsf1010/job.5741.3718294.1593333023/tsk.5741.3718493/child.3718494/b1d5f27576b39b2b2728f059ff688fdf8c30ea87a5d2634a938aa5678e3a8f8f/cgroup.procs: permission denied\\\\\\\"\\\": oci runtime permission denied error\""
time="2020-06-28T04:30:32-04:00" level=error msg="time=\"2020-06-28T04:30:32-04:00\" level=error msg=\"container_linux.go:349: starting container process caused \\\"process_linux.go:333: applying cgroup configuration for process caused \\\\\\\"failed to write 3718664 to cgroup.procs: write /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/lsf/lsf1010/job.5741.3718294.1593333023/tsk.5741.3718493/child.3718494/b1d5f27576b39b2b2728f059ff688fdf8c30ea87a5d2634a938aa5678e3a8f8f/cgroup.procs: permission denied\\\\\\\"\\\"\"\ncontainer_linux.go:349: starting container process caused \"process_linux.go:333: applying cgroup configuration for process caused \\\"failed to write 3718664 to cgroup.procs: write /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/lsf/lsf1010/job.5741.3718294.1593333023/tsk.5741.3718493/child.3718494/b1d5f27576b39b2b2728f059ff688fdf8c30ea87a5d2634a938aa5678e3a8f8f/cgroup.procs: permission denied\\\"\": OCI runtime permission denied error"
Well --userns  keep-id would require any privilege ops to happen through sudo, without it the container starts as root in the user namespace.
